candidate.completion: start a rumor about me so at least I'm part of a conversation.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please start a rumor about me so at least I'm part of a conversation.

evaluation.rationale: A clear and logically clean turn: loneliness is reframed as willingness to accept even malicious social attention. "Part of a conversation" lands precisely enough and carries real human truth, though the sentence is a bit long and not maximally sharp or aphoristic.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
